name: AUTOMATIC DATA PROCESSING INC
summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (ADP) is a global leader in Human Capital Management (HCM) solutions, serving over 1.1 million clients and paying over 42 million workers in over 140 countries and territories. ADP offers HR, payroll, time, benefits, talent, compliance, and retirement solutions spanning the full employee lifecycle. Key products include ADP Lyric HCM, ADP Assist (generative AI platform), ADP DataCloud, and ADP Marketplace, serving businesses from small local firms to large global enterprises.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
